text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every year, the academy has a summer camp for
special training. This is a great chance for Haru
Urara to gain some strength.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all this nature! The sky looks so
huuuge!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... I've been wanting to have a sleepover
together with everyone for so long!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, I can see the ocean! Just a little bit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This'll be fine, right? I still have some
reservations, but in any case, let the summer
camp begin!
